# NIST AI Risk Management Framework

> SYNTHETIC STAND-IN for local development and tests. Paraphrased, not the
> official publication.

## GOVERN

Cultivate a culture of risk management. Policies, roles, and accountability for
AI risks should be defined, documented, and resourced, with clear lines for
escalation and decision rights.

## MAP

Establish the context and categorize the AI system. Understand the intended
purpose, the deployment setting, and the populations affected, so that risks can
be identified in context.

## MEASURE

Analyze, assess, and track AI risks using quantitative and qualitative methods.
Track performance and stability over time, including disparate error rates
across affected groups, against documented thresholds and a reference baseline.

## MANAGE

Allocate resources to mapped and measured risks, prioritizing by impact. When a
measured risk crosses a defined threshold, respond, recover, and communicate —
and record the decision and its basis.
